title: University of Paris
text: Home * Organizations * University of Paris Historic View of University Paris-VI [1] University of Paris , was the university in Paris , France and one of the earliest to be established in Europe, founded in the middle of the 12th century [2] . Today, thirteen successor universities are split over the three academies of the Île-de-France region.
